message:
refactor(tests): convert remaining e2e_workflow handlers to macros [bd-3iwh]

Convert 9 more manual handler impls to macro-annotated functions:

Resource handlers:
- PlainTextResourceHandler → #[resource] plain_text
- JsonResourceHandler → #[resource] json_config
- BinaryResourceHandler → #[resource] binary_data (Vec<ResourceContent>)
- UnicodeResourceHandler → #[resource] unicode_text
- LargeContentResourceHandler → #[resource] large_content
- MultiContentResourceHandler → #[resource] multi_content_items (Vec<ResourceContent>)
- FailingResourceHandler → #[resource] failing_res (McpResult<String>)

Tool handlers:
- RequiredArgsToolHandler → #[tool] required_args_tool
- MultiContentToolHandler → #[tool] multi_content_tool (Vec<Content>)

Only 3 manual handlers remain (ctx state / raw JSON inspection).
All 88 e2e_workflow tests pass unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
